fields.validation_summary: Revalidated 2026-05-31: cargo test -p spec-cli sync_generated -- --nocapture passed; cargo test -p rule-cli --lib sync_targets_writes_spec_doc_targets_into_spec_entries -- --nocapture passed; cargo build -p rule-mcp passed. A broader cargo test -p rule-cli run hit an unrelated Windows os error 740 when Cargo attempted to execute the install_contract_sync integration test binary under this shell.
